strengths: 18+ years of hands-on fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js and React product work (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq)
Current AI-agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — directly matches a rare required skill
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks, and taught testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin exposure absent and Java experience appears dated (robotics work, 2016-2018); Python not listed in skills
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not explicitly named, though broad testing expertise suggests fast ramp-up
response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with strong, recent experience in the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes), plus hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work that maps directly onto the role's internal automation focus. Testing culture, code-review, and mentoring credentials are excellent. The gaps — Nest.js, Kotlin, and specific test-framework names — are framework-level rather than conceptual and are readily learnable given the demonstrated polyglot background.
